title: vitis erythrophylla
intro: Vitis erythrophylla, also known as the Chinese grape vine, is a species of flowering plant in the grape family (Vitaceae). It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Vitis erythrophylla include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and improving cardiovascular health, as well as its potential to protect against certain types of cancer. Herbal preparations of Vitis erythrophylla, such as extracts and teas, are commonly used in traditional Chinese medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
